title: Vue Directives Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of common Vue.js directives like v-bind, v-model, v-if, v-for, and v-show.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the prefix for all Vue.js directives?
Which directive is used to create a two-way data binding on form elements?
What is the difference between v-if and v-show?
options: v-if physically adds or removes elements from the DOM, while v-show toggles their 'display' CSS property.
v-if is only for class components, while v-show is only for functional components.

questions.question: Which directive should you use to render a list of elements from an array?
Does v-bind have a shorthand syntax in Vue templates?
options: No, you must always use v-bind.
